steps.title: Show the study's contrast
steps.content: The popular narrative emphasizes Dust Bowl migration to California. The study complicates that story by showing that migrants in the hardest-hit states relocated within the region more frequently.

steps.title: Reject weak connectors
steps.content: A gives a cause that does not follow from the narrative. C merely adds information and misses the contrast in frequency. D repeats a contrast signal after however without expressing the more-common pattern. The answer is B.
